name: OneMain Financial
description_short: Towson, MD personal loans at OneMain Financial, 8600 Lasalle Rd, offering same-day approval and funding.
description_long:
OneMain Financial's Towson, MD location is at 8600 Lasalle Rd, Suite 400, a standalone branch serving the Baltimore area. This Towson branch is open Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM, closed weekends. The office sits in an accessible commercial area convenient for local residents seeking personal loan services.

At this Towson location, OneMain Financial offers personal loans up to $10,000 with flexible terms and same-day funding options. The loan specialists here can discuss your borrowing needs, whether you're consolidating debt, covering medical expenses, or handling unexpected costs. Call 410-823-3200 to speak with a loan officer or visit in person during business hours.

If you're a Towson or greater Baltimore area resident needing quick access to personal loan options, this branch offers same-day approval and funding on approved applications. Bring a photo ID, proof of income, and bank account information to speed up the process. OneMain Financial specializes in serving borrowers with varied credit profiles.
pros: Fixed rates, fixed payments, and no prepayment penalties provide budget predictability
Same-day funding available within 1 hour of closing via SpeedFunds for eligible debit cardholders
Prequalification process does not affect credit score
Wide range of loan purposes explicitly supported (debt consolidation, auto, medical, home improvement, etc.)
After-hours appointments available to accommodate working customers
Secured and unsecured loan options available
Loan amounts from $1,500–$30,000 with flexible 24–60 month terms
cons: APR range of 11.99%–35.99% is significantly higher than rates from credit unions and online lenders
$1,500 minimum loan amount excludes consumers needing small emergency funds under $1,500
Actual approval rates and final APR depend on credit profile and collateral; advertised rates may not be available to all applicants
Branch-dependent service model limits accessibility compared to fully online lenders
Documentation requirements (proof of income, residence, identity) may slow approval for some applicants
best_for: Borrowers with fair-to-poor credit seeking structured personal loans with predictable payments
Consumers who prefer in-person guidance and local branch support for loan decisions
Individuals needing debt consolidation, auto financing, or home improvement funding between $1,500–$30,000
Customers who value transparent fixed-rate terms and want to avoid prepayment penalties
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best for borrowers with fair-to-poor credit or limited lending history who value transparent terms, fixed payments, and local branch support—but the 11.99%–35.99% APR range makes them significantly more expensive than credit unions or online lenders, and the $1,500 minimum excludes small emergency borrowing needs.
services: Phone-based loan applications and specialist consultations
meta_description: OneMain Financial at 8600 Lasalle Rd ste 400, Towson, MD. Personal loans with same-day approval.
